ground_truth.title: Call for Papers: The Dutch Language and Contact Linguistics II
ground_truth.author: Redactie Neerlandistiek
with: For an edited volume edited by Christopher Joby and Nicoline van der Sijs
In July 2025, a new edited volume, Dutch and Contact Linguistics, was published by John Benjamins in the series IMPACT: Studies in Language, Culture and Society Series.

Like the first volume, the central question that the proposed new volume attempts to answer is in what contexts the Dutch language has had contact with other languages outside the Dutch language area and what the consequences of this contact have been.
For this volume, we invite Dutch linguists, historical sociolinguists, and contact linguists to submit chapters especially on the following topics
Please submit a one-page abstract (ca. 300 words) and a short biography (one paragraph) to Dr. Christopher Joby at c.joby@uea.ac.uk, before March 1st, 2026.
